feedback.text: I believe you should also turn your attention to the video game ownership unfairness in todays world, how games that aren't supported anymore turn into dust being lost forever and wasting the money of whoever bought it. If you want an example of people supporting such an idea look at the Stop Killing Games initiative, many people are agreeing that its wrong this way and should be fixed. So i please hope you take a look and think of your own opinions about it and hopefully agree.
